name: MixtarRVS Base Closure 0005
purpose: Define the MixtarRVS initramfs handoff contract and stage a safe fallback init shim without changing the active EFI loader, initramfs image, PID 1, OpenRC fallback, network services, or rollback profiles.

initramfs_contract.root_strategy: Mount the selected root filesystem read-only first, then expose Mixtar runtime directories before init handoff.

non_goals: Do not rewrite EFI loader entries.
Do not hide POSIX compatibility paths yet.
Do not remove Alpine packages or apk yet.
known_limitations: The active initramfs image is still the pre-existing boot artifact.
The fallback init shim is staged and checkable, but not used by the current boot path.
/System/SystemTools/init currently resolves to /bin/busybox and is treated as compatibility fallback, not as a Mixtar-native init.
Mixtar-native service supervision is not implemented yet; OpenRC remains the live supervisor.
Network and SSH still come from the compatibility/bootstrap layer.
